meeting_title: Prairie Bridge Systems / Voxel Monthly Sync

safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomics monitoring at Glenville dock
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor ergonomic risks on the Glenville dock using the adjusted camera view.

evidence.quote: Maybe some ergo back there for the, yeah, the Glenville dock, I believe that got adjusted.
evidence.speaker: Hayden Easton <fake.hayden.easton@prairiebridgesystems.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Detect equipment set on dock plates
safety_use_cases.description: Use the camera to detect when a machine/equipment is set on the dock plates and ensure it is captured.

evidence.quote: And then, like, if they're setting a machine on the dock plates itself, I would like that covered.
evidence.speaker: Hayden Easton <fake.hayden.easton@prairiebridgesystems.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Actions coaching to impact safety event counts
safety_use_cases.description: Leverage Voxel’s Actions coaching platform to record coaching and see its effect on overall event counts.

evidence.quote: So what I'd like to do is get folks on a call because we have an entirely new coaching platform embedded within Voxel called Actions.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: It also puts markers in your data when you complete coaching actions to show what the after effect is on your overall event count.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Timely alerting for safety issues
safety_use_cases.description: Expand use of alerting to improve visibility and response to events.

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Quarterly shareholder reporting
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Provide an end-of-year (Q4) report for shareholders and set up ongoing quarterly reporting cadence.

evidence.quote: I to say thank you for getting me that report for my shareholders.
evidence.speaker: Hayden Easton <fake.hayden.easton@prairiebridgesystems.com>

evidence.quote: Could I get it to you the week of the 15th?
evidence.speaker: Hayden Easton <fake.hayden.easton@prairiebridgesystems.com>

evidence.quote: March 15th, get that Q4 report to you.

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Automated weekly snapshots and data delivery
